compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can clone this repo and run DSO commands without manual path configuration
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add a self-detection fallback to this repo's .claude/scripts/dso shim so it resolves the plugin root automatically when plugins/dso exists in the repo.
**Why**: Currently the shim fails on fresh clones because dso.plugin_root in dso-config.conf contains a hardcoded absolute path. Self-detection eliminates the need for any manual configuration.
**Scope**:
- IN: Modify .claude/scripts/dso (this repo's copy only) to add a third fallback step; validate via .claude-plugin/plugin.json sentinel; add CI portability smoke test in clean Ubuntu container; fix hardcoded dso.plugin_root in .claude/dso-config.conf
- OUT: Modifying the shim template under plugins/dso/ — host project shim is unaffected. Verified: plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh is the template source and will not be changed.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a developer can clone this repo on a fresh machine (macOS or Linux) and run .claude/scripts/dso ticket list without setting any environment variables or editing any config files — the shim resolves REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso automatically
  ← Satisfies: "A developer clones this repo on a fresh machine (macOS or Linux) and can run .claude/scripts/dso ticket list without any manual path configuration"
- When this story is complete, a CI portability smoke test runs .claude/scripts/dso ticket list in a clean Ubuntu container with no prior DSO configuration and the command exits 0
  ← Satisfies: "A CI portability smoke test runs .claude/scripts/dso ticket list in a clean Ubuntu container"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for the shim self-detection fallback logic including sentinel validation
  ← Satisfies: unit test DoD requirement

## Considerations

- [Testing] Sentinel validation needs test coverage on both macOS and Linux (case sensitivity, path separators)
- [Scenario] Shim validates plugin identity via .claude-plugin/plugin.json sentinel file, not just directory existence — prevents false activation in host projects that coincidentally have plugins/dso/

comments.body: Done definition update: When the shim resolves DSO_ROOT via sentinel fallback, discover-agents.sh must be able to locate config/agent-routing.conf via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT. Verify: discover-agents.sh uses the sentinel-resolved path correctly.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
